textByHashes.aa11cfdee31175cceba8a17cf04193ca100a255e: Welcome to the Brimhaven Agility Arena!
textByHashes.0530776f5e25e9a4c88d5e9321ba236cae07b619: If ye want to know more talk to Cap'n Izzy, he found it!
textByHashes.265e58a41b0f40fefba461b7bd68c21978a34366: I be the Jack o' Tickets. I exchange the tickets ye collect in the Agility Arena for more stuff. Ye can obtain more agility experience or some items ye won't find anywhere else!
textByHashes.e8e9660837c8be6df0b3117c8ce52318e369e61c: Aye, ye be on the right tack.
textByHashes.402e9aa4e8afc27278c18588b67602a7c0f1fba3: Arr, ye have that, I see yer list. I s'pose ye'll be wantin' yer reward then!
textByHashes.fe82f4a2ddaf325c0776d5019383c3bc995bac38: Arrr, ye'll 'ave ta come back when ye has more space in yer pack.
textByHashes.26a00cd772b8a98b9fcfcc85909c306e0dcf03b7: These 'ere Karamja gloves be a symbol of yer explorin' on the island. I'll 'ave a word with some of the seafarin' folk who sail to Port Sarim and Ardougne, so they'll take ye on board half price if ye be wearin' them.
textByHashes.0fbcc417eaae54bdf8daf2c6bf99c1c01e8c2c50: Arr, so ye have. I s'pose ye'll be wantin' yer reward upgraded then!
textByHashes.b61c5db4a0ac8245a1095032fd37b663288ed5e6: The enchantment on these 'ere Karamja gloves be a symbol of yer further explorin' on the island. They'll take ye to an underground mine in Shilo, Cap'n Izzy's arranged it so ye gets a little extra benefit in our
textByHashes.63608b3b65e01db5da54a415be36c1e3c4ed8145: Agility Arena. Ye can have this lamp too.
textByHashes.737c6e5eef0e2188b158716c4a4f670dc5f1c48f: Arr, so ye have. I s'pose ye'll be wantin' yer reward upgraded again!
textByHashes.1209d611305ff0833282b5ad5923761a434d2736: The enchantment on these 'ere Karamja gloves be a symbol of yer exhaustive explorin'. They'll take ye to a mine under Shilo Village now infinitely, an' all the merchants will give ye discounts. Ye can have this lamp
textByHashes.20c7a2ab125a20ecf71bd0401cbe7f31c23d2ecf: Arr, that be an incredible achievement, so it be! I suppose ye'll be wanting yer reward upgraded again.
textByHashes.8439b2e196408eb9b17d1bcc78dcc1ce14359d33: The enchantment on these 'ere Karamja gloves be the ultimate symbol of yer exhaustive explorin'. Ye'll now get double TokKul from the Fight Cave, Inferno an' TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges.
textByHashes.b8e6323cb1e2206626996f8f5c0824217db9b06f: Ye'll have a chance for double tickets in our Agility Arena 'ere. Ye can resurrect in the Fight Cave once per day, an' even enter some places fer free.
textByHashes.709f5561b72ea6a870c3755777b97afb7d9cb5c1: I can make the metal dragons under Brimhaven give ye bars as banknotes too, if ye likes.
textByHashes.160f8e60544fe803a0c1a564fc9ba951694347e5: Ye can have that lamp too.
textByHashes.0d271ad5ef5f9c7ab43d5beaf06132549dcce942: Arrr, it be a diary that tracks yer achievements on Karamja. Once ye've explored enough, I give ye some enchanted gloves, an' the people of Karamja reward ye for yer hard work.
textByHashes.73d22b50c03703ee1ecd7794e9080d4e47c7b09b: Arrr, that depends what tier ye wants to know about.
textByHashes.28890bd0c72f0d81320103562704d85ad42f3a6e: Ye gets a pair of special Karamja gloves. The seafarin' folk who sail to Port Sarim and Ardougne will take ye on board half price if ye be wearin' them.
textByHashes.3c8b1d2b51785300ccb215af70226f061f23f359: Arrr, I upgrade the Karamja gloves so ye gets a little extra benefit in our Agility Arena with 'em on, and now they'll take ye to the special mine under Shilo Village, an ye still gets the easy rewards too.
textByHashes.f5e2e5ef58bd98d22749de306f9cb15d9114e1eb: Arrr, I upgrade the Karamja gloves so they can take ye to a special mine under Shilo Village infinitely. Ye still gets the easy and medium rewards too.
textByHashes.fa18a3eb66f9169567723fde81d76321ce252e9f: Arrr, ye can get double TokKul from the Fight Cave, Inferno an' TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges, an' have a chance for double tickets in our Agility Arena 'ere.
textByHashes.d7cd15181788123c45ca54157713768973680647: Ye can resurrect in the Fight Cave once per day, an' even enter some places fer free.
textByHashes.c849fcd7930b2e6e8893d68c8d79ef2309ef205f: I can make the metal dragons under Brimhaven give ye bars as banknotes too, if ye likes. Ye still gets the easy, medium an' hard rewards too.
textByHashes.2709583100893f73cfaad646f6ea6f417d1b1fb2: Arrr, those metal dragons under Brimhaven will drop their bars as banknotes for ye.
textByHashes.a5460f4ebefa2514ea3a482bb0e459e1a1794c40: Arrr, those metal dragons under Brimhaven will drop their bars as normal items for ye.
textByHashes.51deaa165a88be6b0720af149626bde57401215b: I be no herbalist but I were given the recipes to go with these herbs...
textByHashes.239a10d8a74a46ab62c0a5d3c613cc8aae2c5d43: Ahoy! Yer want to swap these old tickets for some vouchers?
textByHashes.1dbcb549b6437f0ebeb82e869360b8883143e0f0: Do ye want the colour removing off that? Ye won't get yer tickets back, mind you.
